candidate_summary: GHO-HEMCHU-POCKET: attention-mask private context-pocket with cryptographic canary-verified unfold-trigger for one-step privileged reveal.

results_analysis.title: Canari LLM (PyPI)
results_analysis.rationale: Canary-token mechanism for prompt-injection detection overlaps directly with candidate's canary-verified access; multiple keyword matches plus sem>=0.7 and func>=0.7.

results_analysis.title: Rebuff LLM Prompt Injection Detector
results_analysis.rationale: Canary-word in system prompt + leak check is functionally equivalent to GHO canary check; multi-criteria match.

results_analysis.title: Model Context Protocol Security (CoSAI OASIS)
results_analysis.rationale: Dual-LLM privileged/quarantined pattern is a direct functional twin for privilege-gated reveal; high semantic and functional scores.

results_analysis.title: OWASP LLM Prompt Injection Prevention
results_analysis.rationale: Access-control with privilege levels covers access-gated reveal mechanism; meets all three criteria.

results_analysis.title: The Hidden Scratchpad (Huben Substack)
results_analysis.rationale: Hidden scratchpad is an EXACT twin for default-private context; highest functional score; candidate itself acknowledges this as prior art.

results_analysis.title: Engineering Trustworthy LM Agents with Scratchpads (Masood)
results_analysis.rationale: Scratchpads + verifier-controlled exposure is direct functional twin of canary-verified unfold.

results_analysis.title: Token-Guard ICLR 2026 Token-Level Hallucination Control
results_analysis.rationale: Hallucination-control decoding, not access-gating; below all thresholds.

results_analysis.title: Can LLMs Keep a Secret Contextual Integrity (OpenReview)
results_analysis.rationale: Contextual-integrity secret-keeping covers private-token gating dimension; meets all criteria.

verdict_sentence: FAIL: 7 of 8 results hit the candidate via keyword overlap, semantic similarity >=0.7, and functional equivalence (max func 0.90 hidden-scratchpad; max sem 0.88), and the candidate itself concedes prior art (hidden scratchpad, canary-token, dual-LLM); GHO-HEMCHU-POCKET is a recombination of existing components and is not novel.
